memory_entries.text: In the recurring SQLite product dataset benchmark, group g1 is Office Products, g2 is Electronics, and g3 is Musical Instruments. items_g* use ref_id primary key and prc/list price; fdbk_g1/g2 have integer ts, fdbk_g3 has TEXT ts dates (YYYY-MM-DD) with only 3 NULLs, so musical reviews are considered missing a full event timestamp when ts is NULL or length<19.
